subject: Coordination brief: launch activities around Adelaide | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-3277
body: Please note the launch stream in Adelaide has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-3277. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
